global_description: A medium-sized bird with a slender body and a striking color pattern. It features a predominantly black head and back, with vibrant orange-yellow underparts. The wings and tail are black with white markings, and the beak is pointed and pale.

part_details.head: Black, smooth, with a glossy sheen.
part_details.wings: Black with distinct white markings, elongated and pointed.

spatial_relations: The black head transitions into the black back.
The orange-yellow underparts contrast with the black wings.
The wings are positioned laterally, extending from the body.
The tail fans out from the rear of the body.
